purpose: Clementine-native component intent map for agents. Generated from specs; do not hand-edit.

accordion.intent: Progressive disclosure for a stack of independent sections — FAQs, grouped settings, long forms. Lets users scan headers and open only what they need.
accordion.use_when: - Keep control labels to a scannable phrase
accordion.dont_use_when: - Put an accordion inside an accordion — flatten or use Tabs

activity-feed.intent: A chronological stream of who-did-what-when (audit-adjacent, human-readable).
activity-feed.use_when: Attribute each item to an actor + time; Order consistently (newest first).

agent-card.intent: A profile card for an agent — identity, what it does, capabilities, and owner. Used in rosters and pickers.
agent-card.use_when: State capabilities + scope + owner; Keep the description concrete.

agent-picker.intent: Choose or route between agents. Distinct from ModelSelector (which picks a model).
agent-picker.use_when: Show the active agent clearly; Pair with AgentCard detail on selection.
agent-picker.dont_use_when: Offer agents the user can't use; Switch agents silently mid-task.

agent-status.intent: The agent's current state — idle / thinking / calling tool / waiting on you / done / error / refused — shown with an indicator AND text.
agent-status.use_when: Pair the indicator with text; Announce changes politely; Distinguish waiting-on-you clearly.
agent-status.dont_use_when: Use a bare color/spinner with no label; Conflate error with refusal.

alert.intent: Inline status message. Calls attention to something the user needs to know without interrupting their flow. Four intents: info, success, warning, error.
alert.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
alert.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

anchor.intent: A text link for navigation. Distinct from Button (which performs an action).
anchor.use_when: Underline on hover/focus — never color alone (WCAG 1.4.1); Use descriptive link text ("access policy", not "click here"); Add rel="noopener" on target="_blank".
anchor.dont_use_when: Style a Button as a link or vice versa; Use "here"/"link" as the text; Convey state with color only.

artifact-frame.intent: A titled container for a substantial generated output (document, code file, rendered preview) lifted out of the chat stream. Header carries the title, a kind badge, and actions (copy / download / open).
artifact-frame.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
artifact-frame.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

attachment-pill.intent: A file attached to a prompt, shown as a removable pill in the Composer.
attachment-pill.use_when: Truncate long names with an ellipsis; show size; Make remove keyboard-reachable + labelled; Show type/size errors before send.
attachment-pill.dont_use_when: Hide that a file is attached; Make remove unreachable by keyboard.

audit-log-viewer.intent: A chronological, attributable record of actions — who did what to what, when.
audit-log-viewer.use_when: Attribute every entry to a principal; Make it sortable/filterable + exportable; Keep timestamps precise.
audit-log-viewer.dont_use_when: Allow unattributable entries; Mutate/hide log rows.

autocomplete.intent: A text input that suggests matching options as you type but still allows free text. Use **Select** when the value must be one of the options; use **Autocomplete** when free text is valid.
autocomplete.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
autocomplete.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

avatar.intent: A compact, recognizable stand-in for a person or entity — a photo, initials, or a fallback icon. Used in headers, tables, comment threads, and presence stacks.
avatar.dont_use_when: - Use `alt="avatar"` or `alt="user photo"` — describe the person

badge.intent: Non-interactive label that communicates status, severity, or count. Never clickable — if it needs to be tappable, use Button.
badge.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
badge.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

breadcrumbs.intent: A hierarchical trail showing where the current page sits, with one-click jumps to ancestors.
breadcrumbs.use_when: Mark the last item as current (not a link); Keep labels short — match the page titles; Truncate the middle with an ellipsis on small screens.
breadcrumbs.dont_use_when: Link the current page to itself; Use it as the only way back; Rely on the separator glyph alone for structure.

bulk-action-bar.intent: Appears when table rows are selected: shows the count and the bulk actions available.
bulk-action-bar.use_when: Show the count; offer Clear; Gate destructive bulk actions behind a confirm; Pair with undo.
bulk-action-bar.dont_use_when: Hide what is selected; Run destructive bulk actions with no confirm.

button.intent: Primary action trigger. Use to initiate actions like submit, save, cancel, or navigate. Three intents (primary, secondary, destructive), three variations (filled, outline, subtle) across three sizes (sm, md, lg).
button.dont_use_when: - Use `<div role="button">` — Mantine returns a `<button>`, keep it

button-group.intent: Joins a set of related buttons into one visually-connected control.
button-group.use_when: Keep members the same size/variant; Limit to a few buttons.
button-group.dont_use_when: Mix variants within a group; Cram many buttons.

calendar.intent: Read-mostly month view for showing dates: availability, scheduled events, activity heat. Decorate days via `renderDay` / `getDayProps`. If the user is *choosing* a date, that's [DatePicker](../date-picker/index.md).
calendar.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
calendar.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

card.intent: A surface that groups related content into a single, scannable unit — a dashboard tile, a list row's detail, a settings block. The Card is **presentational by default**; it carries no interaction unless you make it one.
card.use_when: - Use `CardSection` for media so images touch the card edges
card.dont_use_when: - Wrap a card in a bare `<div onClick>` — that's invisible to keyboards and AT

carousel.intent: Horizontally swipeable panels where space is tight and content is browsable: image galleries, template pickers, onboarding cards.
carousel.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
carousel.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

character-counter.intent: A live character count for text inputs, with an over-limit state.
character-counter.use_when: Show current and max ("12 / 280"); Bold near the limit; turn red when over.
character-counter.dont_use_when: Signal over-limit by color alone (bold + value also change); Hide the limit until exceeded.

chart.intent: Dashboard time-series and category comparison. One spec covers the family on purpose: an agent choosing Area vs Line vs Bar is choosing geometry, not a new visual language.
chart.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
chart.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

checkbox.intent: Binary or tri-state form input. Use for non-exclusive selection (multi-select) or for opt-in/opt-out toggles inside a form. For exclusive choice use Radio. For settings outside a form use Switch.
checkbox.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
checkbox.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

chip.intent: A compact, toggleable selection — filter chips and multi-choice pickers. Distinct from Badge (read-only status).
chip.use_when: Use ChipGroup for single/multi selection; Keep labels to 1-2 words; Show selected state with fill AND the checked affordance.
chip.dont_use_when: Use chips for status (that is Badge); Rely on color alone for selected; Overflow a row with 20 chips — group or filter.

citation-chip.intent: Inline provenance for an AI claim — a small superscript `[n]` that links to its source and reveals source + snippet on hover/focus. Accessible name is "Source N: <source>".
citation-chip.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
citation-chip.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

code.intent: Monospace formatting for code, commands, and literal values — inline or as a block.
code.use_when: Use inline for short literals, block for multi-line; Keep blocks short; lift big output into an ArtifactFrame.
code.dont_use_when: Use for emphasis; Put paragraphs of prose in Code.

code-block.intent: A copyable code block for model-generated code, with a filename/language header. For large output, wrap in an ArtifactFrame.
code-block.use_when: Always offer copy with clear feedback; Label the language/filename; Wrap big output in an ArtifactFrame.
code-block.dont_use_when: Force horizontal scroll for one long line without wrap option; Drop the language label.

color-input.intent: Pick a color via a swatch preview plus an editable hex field.
color-input.use_when: Show the hex value as text; Offer a defined swatch palette; Validate hex input.
color-input.dont_use_when: Rely on the swatch alone; Use color as the sole carrier of meaning.

comment-thread.intent: A list of comments plus a composer for adding more.
comment-thread.use_when: Attribute + timestamp each comment; Support @mentions; Disable submit on empty.
comment-thread.dont_use_when: Lose draft text; Allow empty comments.

composer.intent: The prompt input. Autosizing textarea + a Send affordance that becomes **Stop** while `busy`. Enter submits, Shift+Enter newlines. Always keep Stop reachable during generation (see [behaviors](../../behaviors/README.md)).
composer.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
composer.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

confidence-meter.intent: Communicates how confident the model is in an answer, with filled bars AND a text label.
confidence-meter.use_when: Pair the bars with a text label (never color alone); Map to a real confidence signal, not decoration; Prompt verification on low confidence.
confidence-meter.dont_use_when: Show confidence the model cannot actually measure; Use color as the only cue.

context-meter.intent: Shows how much of the context window is consumed (used / total), warning as it nears the limit.
context-meter.use_when: Warn before the limit; show the numbers; Use role=meter with aria values.
context-meter.dont_use_when: Surprise the user at the hard limit; Show the bar without the figures.

conversation-thread.intent: The scrollable container for a conversation — holds Message turns with consistent spacing and an aria-live log region.
conversation-thread.use_when: Announce new turns politely (aria-live); Group with day dividers for long histories; Keep newest in view.
conversation-thread.dont_use_when: Steal focus on each new message; Reflow the whole thread on append.

cost-meter.intent: Usage transparency for a run — tokens, estimated cost, and elapsed latency. Enterprise-critical (usage is billable + audited).
cost-meter.use_when: Show tokens + cost + latency plainly; Keep estimates honest/labeled.
cost-meter.dont_use_when: Hide cost where it is billed; Imply false precision.

date-input.intent: Date entry as a form field. The user can type ("11 jun 2026", "06/11/2026") or pick from the popover. Belongs inside a [FormField](../../patterns/form-field/index.md) like every other input.
date-input.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
date-input.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

date-picker.intent: Inline calendar for choosing a single date, a range (`type="range"`), or multiple dates (`type="multiple"`). Always visible — no popover of its own.
date-picker.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
date-picker.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

description-list.intent: Term/detail pairs for record metadata and key-value summaries; renders semantic dl/dt/dd.
description-list.use_when: Use real dl/dt/dd; Keep terms short + consistent.
description-list.dont_use_when: Fake it with a two-column table when it is metadata; Mix unrelated pairs.

diff-view.intent: A proposed change shown as added/removed lines with accept/reject — pairs with an agent suggesting an edit.
diff-view.use_when: Mark add/remove with sign + color (not color alone); Offer per-change accept/reject.
diff-view.dont_use_when: Apply changes silently; Use color as the only signal.

disclosure-badge.intent: A small, consistent marker that content was produced or assisted by AI. Disclosure is non-negotiable for AI output; this gives it one reusable form.
disclosure-badge.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
disclosure-badge.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

divider.intent: A thin rule that separates content groups, optionally with a centered or aligned label.
divider.use_when: Use spacing first; reach for a line only when grouping is ambiguous; Label it when the split has meaning ("or").
divider.dont_use_when: Stack multiple dividers; Use as a decorative flourish.

drawer.intent: A panel that slides in from a screen edge for a secondary task — filters, record details, create/edit — while keeping the page behind it. Prefer a Drawer over a Modal when the task is *contextual* to that page.
drawer.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
drawer.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

empty-state.intent: A centered placeholder for no-data or cleared-filter views, with an optional next action.
empty-state.use_when: Pair a short title with a clear next action; Keep the icon muted and decorative.
empty-state.dont_use_when: Blame the user for empty data; Use for error or loading conditions.

error-state.intent: A centered failure state with a cause and an optional retry.
error-state.use_when: Say what failed in plain language; Offer a retry or next step.
error-state.dont_use_when: Expose raw stack traces; Use color as the only error signal.

export-menu.intent: A dropdown of export formats (CSV, JSON, PDF) for a data view.
export-menu.use_when: List supported formats clearly; Disable formats that are not applicable.
export-menu.dont_use_when: Offer formats that will fail; Hide the format choice behind a guess.

fab.intent: A floating action button for the single primary action on a surface (e.g. New).
fab.use_when: One FAB per screen; set aria-label; Keep it out of the way of content; Use a clear, single-purpose icon.
fab.dont_use_when: Stack multiple FABs; Use for secondary actions.

faceted-filter.intent: Grouped, checkable facets with counts for narrowing a result set.
faceted-filter.use_when: Show result counts per facet; Persist selections; allow clearing; Group related facets.
faceted-filter.dont_use_when: Hide how many results a facet yields; Reset filters silently.

feedback-control.intent: Thumbs up/down on an AI response — the first link in the evaluation loop. Toggleable, exposes `aria-pressed`, each button labelled for AT.
feedback-control.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
feedback-control.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

field-label.intent: A form field label with optional required or optional markers.
field-label.use_when: Associate via htmlFor and the control id; Mark required with the asterisk AND screen-reader text.
field-label.dont_use_when: Use color (red asterisk) as the only required cue; Hide labels for sighted users.

fieldset.intent: Visually and semantically group related form controls under a legend.
fieldset.use_when: Give every fieldset a meaningful legend; Use to chunk long forms into scannable groups.
fieldset.dont_use_when: Nest fieldsets deeply; Use as a generic container (that is Card).

file-input.intent: A control to pick one or more files, showing the chosen file name(s).
file-input.use_when: Show the selected file name; allow clearing; State accepted types + size limits; Validate type/size and surface errors.
file-input.dont_use_when: Hide what was selected; Accept everything silently then fail on submit.

helper-text.intent: Supporting hint text shown beneath a form control.
helper-text.use_when: Keep it short and persistent; Wire id to the control’s aria-describedby.
helper-text.dont_use_when: Use for validation errors; Repeat the label verbatim.

hitl-gate.intent: A human-in-the-loop checkpoint that pauses an agent before a consequential action runs (write, delete, send, spend). Caution-styled on `feedback.warning` with Approve / Deny / Edit. The gated action's preview goes in the body.
hitl-gate.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
hitl-gate.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

hover-card.intent: Reveal supplementary, non-interactive detail on hover/focus — a richer Tooltip (avatar preview, definition, stats).
hover-card.use_when: Open on hover AND focus; small open delay; Keep content read-only and brief; Provide the same info elsewhere for touch/SR.
hover-card.dont_use_when: Put buttons/links inside (use Popover); Rely on it as the only path to the info.

icon-button.intent: An icon-only action for toolbars and row actions; always needs an aria-label and ideally a Tooltip.
icon-button.use_when: Always set aria-label; Pair with a Tooltip; Keep a 44x44 hit area.
icon-button.dont_use_when: Ship without an accessible name; Use an ambiguous icon alone.

image.intent: A responsive image with a fallback for load errors.
image.use_when: Always set alt (empty alt="" only when decorative); Provide a fallback; Set width/height to avoid layout shift.

indicator.intent: A small dot or count overlaid on another element (avatar, icon, tab) to flag new or pending items.
indicator.use_when: Give counts an accessible label ("3 unread"); Cap large counts ("9+"); Keep the dot from covering meaningful content.
indicator.dont_use_when: Encode meaning in the dot color alone; Use for long text (that is Badge).

inline-message.intent: A compact inline status line (icon + text) for info, success, warning, or error.
inline-message.use_when: Keep messages to one line where possible; Let the glyph shape and wording carry the status.
inline-message.dont_use_when: Rely on the icon color alone (WCAG 1.4.1); Use for long-form content.

kbd.intent: Renders a keyboard key or shortcut (⌘, Ctrl, Enter) as a key cap.
kbd.use_when: One key per Kbd; join combos with a "+"; Match the platform (⌘ on mac, Ctrl on win).
kbd.dont_use_when: Put whole phrases in a Kbd; Use for non-keyboard content.

list.intent: Ordered or unordered lists with consistent markers and spacing.
list.use_when: Use semantic ul/ol; Keep items parallel in structure.
list.dont_use_when: Fake a list with divs; Nest deeply.

loader.intent: An indeterminate spinner for work of unknown duration. For known progress, use Progress; for content placeholders, use Skeleton.
loader.use_when: Pair with aria-busy on the region and a text label; Respect prefers-reduced-motion; Keep it brief; escalate to Skeleton/Progress for longer waits.
loader.dont_use_when: Use as the only signal for a long operation; Animate when reduced motion is requested.

loading-state.intent: A centered spinner with a label for a loading region.
loading-state.use_when: Give the spinner a text label; Keep it centered in the region it replaces.
loading-state.dont_use_when: Block the whole screen for small loads; Use color as the only cue.

maintenance-banner.intent: A full-width system banner for maintenance / degraded / down states. Severity by color + icon + text.
maintenance-banner.use_when: Carry severity with icon + text, not color alone; State impact + ETA if known; Keep it dismissible only when safe.
maintenance-banner.dont_use_when: Use color alone for severity; Leave a stale banner up after recovery.

memory-panel.intent: The persistent facts an agent holds about the user/context — viewable and deletable (user control over memory).
memory-panel.use_when: Make every fact deletable; Show what is remembered plainly; Confirm destructive clears.
memory-panel.dont_use_when: Hide what the agent remembers; Make memory un-editable.

mention.intent: An inline @reference to a user or entity within text.
mention.use_when: Make it visually distinct + linkable; Resolve to a real profile when possible.
mention.dont_use_when: Style like plain text; Mention unresolved/unknown users silently.

menu.intent: A dropdown list of **actions** triggered by a control — row actions, an overflow "⋯" menu, an account menu. For *selecting a value*, use Select; Menu is for *doing things*.
menu.use_when: - Use Menu for actions, Select for values
menu.dont_use_when: - Put form fields or inputs inside a menu — that's a Popover

message.intent: A single turn in a chat thread. User turns align right on `action.primary`; assistant/system align left on a subtle surface. `status="streaming"` sets `aria-busy`; `error` shows a failure line.
message.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
message.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

message-actions.intent: The action row on a Message — copy, edit, regenerate, branch. Only handlers you pass render.
message-actions.use_when: Label every icon; pair with Tooltip; Show on hover/focus, keep keyboard-reachable.
message-actions.dont_use_when: Hide critical actions behind hover only; Ship unlabeled icons.

modal.intent: Blocking overlay that interrupts the page to demand a decision or show critical content. Use sparingly — most flows belong inline.
modal.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
modal.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

model-selector.intent: Pick the active model for a surface; the chosen model + prompt version should be logged with feedback.
model-selector.use_when: Show the active model clearly; Record model + prompt version with telemetry (see registry); Default to the policy-approved model.
model-selector.dont_use_when: Offer models the user is not entitled to; Switch silently mid-task.

multi-select.intent: Pick several values from a list; selections show as removable pills.
multi-select.use_when: Make pills removable; support search for long lists; Show a clear empty/no-results state; Cap or scroll very long lists.
multi-select.dont_use_when: Use for single selection; Hide selected count behind color.

notification.intent: A self-contained status card for transient feedback — the visual a toast system renders. Distinct from Alert (inline, persistent).
notification.use_when: Announce via aria-live (polite for info, assertive for errors); Auto-dismiss info; let errors persist; Pair color with an icon + text.
notification.dont_use_when: Stack a wall of notifications; Auto-dismiss errors the user must act on; Carry critical-only info in a toast.

notification-center.intent: A panel of system/activity notifications, unread first, each markable.
notification-center.use_when: Show unread distinctly (dot + weight); Group/sort by recency; Let users mark read / clear.
notification-center.dont_use_when: Rely on color alone for unread; Lose notifications silently.

number-input.intent: A numeric input with optional steppers, min/max, and formatting (seats, quotas, counts).
number-input.use_when: Set min/max/step to constrain input; Right-align numerals in tables; Show units in the label or suffix.
number-input.dont_use_when: Use for non-numeric data; Hide validation errors.

pagination.intent: Page navigation for long, chunked result sets. Pair with a results count ("Showing 1–20 of 240") so users know where they are.
pagination.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
pagination.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

password-input.intent: A masked text input with a visibility toggle, for passwords and secrets.
password-input.use_when: Offer a show/hide toggle; Pair with clear strength/criteria text; Never log or echo the value.
password-input.dont_use_when: Disable paste; Show the secret by default.

permission-request.intent: A least-privilege access request — "Agent wants to do X (scope Y)" → Allow / Deny. Central to privileged-access contexts.
permission-request.use_when: State the exact action + scope; Default to least privilege; allow scoping down; Log the decision.
permission-request.dont_use_when: Request broad access by default; Bundle unrelated permissions.

pill.intent: A compact, often-removable token representing a selected value or applied filter.
pill.use_when: Make remove keyboard-reachable + labelled; Truncate long values.

pin-input.intent: A segmented input for short codes — OTP / MFA / verification PINs.
pin-input.use_when: Auto-advance between cells; allow paste of the full code; Set inputmode/type for numeric codes; Label the whole group.
pin-input.dont_use_when: Block paste; Use for long inputs.

plan-steps.intent: An agent's task decomposition with live per-step status. Distinct from Stepper (a user-driven form flow).
plan-steps.use_when: Show status by glyph + text; Update live as steps complete; Surface errors on the failing step.
plan-steps.dont_use_when: Use color alone for status; Hide which step is active.

popover.intent: A floating panel anchored to a trigger, for rich content a Tooltip cannot hold (mini-forms, details, pickers).
popover.use_when: Move focus into the dropdown; close on Escape + outside click; Anchor near the trigger; flip when space is tight; Keep content scoped — escalate big content to a Modal/Drawer.
popover.dont_use_when: Put critical-only info inside (it is dismissible); Nest popovers; Trap the user with no close path.

presence-indicator.intent: Who is here, as a stack of avatars each with a presence dot.
presence-indicator.use_when: Pair dot with the person name (tooltip); Cap the stack with a +N.
presence-indicator.dont_use_when: Convey presence by color alone; Show stale presence as live.

progress.intent: A determinate bar showing how far a known task has progressed (upload, import, quota used). For unknown-duration work, use Skeleton or a spinner instead.
progress.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
progress.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

progress-circle.intent: A circular determinate progress indicator with a center label.
progress-circle.use_when: Show the numeric value in the center; Set aria-valuenow for assistive tech.
progress-circle.dont_use_when: Use for indeterminate states; Convey the value by color alone.

prompt-suggestions.intent: Clickable starter prompts shown above an empty Composer, tied to real capabilities.
prompt-suggestions.use_when: Offer 3-4 concrete, verb-first prompts; Tie each to a real, supported capability; Get out of the way once a conversation starts.
prompt-suggestions.dont_use_when: Suggest unsupported actions; Show a wall of suggestions.

radio.intent: Mutually exclusive choice within a group. For non-exclusive selection use Checkbox.
radio.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
radio.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

rating.intent: Capture or display a star rating (feedback score, quality).
rating.use_when: Label what is being rated; support fractions for display; Allow keyboard selection; Use readOnly for display-only.
rating.dont_use_when: Use color alone to mean "good/bad"; Make a display-only rating look interactive.

rbac-matrix.intent: A role x permission grid of checkboxes for least-privilege access management.
rbac-matrix.use_when: Label each cell (role can permission); Make least-privilege the default; Log grant changes.
rbac-matrix.dont_use_when: Default to broad grants; Leave cells unlabelled for AT.

reasoning-trace.intent: A collapsible, de-emphasized view of the model's intermediate thinking. Collapsed by default; the toggle is a real button with `aria-expanded`. Content is dimmed so it reads as secondary to the answer.
reasoning-trace.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
reasoning-trace.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

refusal-state.intent: A clear, non-dead-end refusal — "I can't do X; here's why, try Y." Styled NEUTRALLY, not as an error.
refusal-state.use_when: Give a clear reason + a forward path; Style neutrally (not alarming red); Keep it short and honest.
refusal-state.dont_use_when: Dead-end the user; Style a refusal as an error; Be preachy.

role-picker.intent: Assign one or more roles to a user or group (a MultiSelect preset for RBAC).
role-picker.use_when: Offer search for long role lists; Show assigned roles as removable pills; Respect least-privilege defaults.
role-picker.dont_use_when: Default to broad roles; Allow assigning roles the assigner cannot grant.

saved-views.intent: Switch between saved filter/column configurations, and save the current one.
saved-views.use_when: Mark the active view (aria-current); Let users save the current config.
saved-views.dont_use_when: Lose the active indicator; Overwrite a shared view without confirm.

search-field.intent: A TextInput preset for search: type=search, a leading search affordance, and a clearable value.
search-field.use_when: Debounce queries; pair with typeahead/faceted results; Offer a clear control; Announce result counts.
search-field.dont_use_when: Search on every keystroke without debounce; Hide what was searched.

segmented-control.intent: Pick one of a small set of mutually-exclusive options — a compact, styled radio group.
segmented-control.use_when: Keep to 2-5 short options; Default to the most common choice; Use full-width inside narrow containers.
segmented-control.dont_use_when: Overflow with long labels; Use for more than ~5 options; Hide the active segment behind color alone.

select.intent: Single-choice picker for a closed list of options. Use Select when the list is short to medium and known up front. For type-ahead / search use a Combobox (not yet specced).
select.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
select.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

session-device-list.intent: Active sessions/devices for a principal, each revocable — a privileged-access staple.
session-device-list.use_when: Mark the current device; protect it from revoke; Show location + last-active; Confirm revoke.
session-device-list.dont_use_when: Let users revoke their current session by accident; Hide where/when a session was active.

session-list.intent: Past conversations — searchable and resumable, with the active one marked.
session-list.use_when: Mark the active session (aria-current); Truncate long titles; show recency; Make rows keyboard-activatable.
session-list.dont_use_when: Lose the active indicator; Hide timestamps for long histories.

skeleton.intent: A placeholder that mimics the shape of content while it loads — reduces layout shift and perceived wait. Use for first-load of *known* layouts (cards, rows, avatars), not for every async state.
skeleton.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
skeleton.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

slider.intent: Select a value from a continuous range by dragging (thresholds, volume, sensitivity).
slider.use_when: Show the current value (bubble or adjacent text); Support keyboard (arrows, Home/End); Add marks for meaningful stops.
slider.dont_use_when: Use when the exact value matters; Rely on position alone with no value readout.

sources-panel.intent: The provenance list behind a cited answer; pairs with inline CitationChip [n] markers.
sources-panel.use_when: Number sources to match inline [n] chips; Link to the real source; show a snippet; Keep it collapsible for long lists.
sources-panel.dont_use_when: Fabricate sources; Link to a page that does not support the claim.

sparkline.intent: Shape-of-the-trend at a glance — no axes, no labels, no tooltip. If the reader needs values, it's a [Chart](../chart/index.md).
sparkline.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
sparkline.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.
required_aria: img role with trend summary label

split-button.intent: A primary action joined to a dropdown of related actions (Save / Save as…).
split-button.use_when: Make the primary action the most common one; Label the dropdown trigger.
split-button.dont_use_when: Hide the primary action behind the menu; Put unrelated items in the menu.

spoiler.intent: Truncate long content to a max height with a show-more/less toggle.
spoiler.use_when: Set a sensible max height; label the toggle clearly; Keep the toggle keyboard-operable.
spoiler.dont_use_when: Hide essential content behind it; Use for navigation.

stat.intent: A KPI/metric tile: a label, a large value, and an optional trend delta.
stat.use_when: Pair the trend arrow with text + color; Keep labels short; Right-size the value type.
stat.dont_use_when: Show a delta with color/arrow but no number; Cram units ambiguously.

status-dot.intent: A small colored dot plus a text label for presence or health state.
status-dot.use_when: Always pair the dot with a text label; Keep the color set consistent across the app.
status-dot.dont_use_when: Use the dot color as the only signal (WCAG 1.4.1); Invent new status colors.

stepper.intent: Ordered progress through a multi-step flow (wizard, onboarding, guided setup).
stepper.use_when: Show total + current position; mark active with aria-current="step"; Validate per step; preserve data on Back; Gate the final commit behind a Review step.
stepper.dont_use_when: Hide the finish line; Lose entered data when going Back; Signal the active step by color alone.

streaming-text.intent: Progressively-revealed model output with a blinking caret while streaming. `aria-live="polite"` so screen readers announce updates without interruption; the caret animation is disabled under `prefers-reduced-motion`.
streaming-text.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
streaming-text.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

success-state.intent: A centered confirmation state for a completed flow.
success-state.use_when: Confirm what happened and what is next; Keep it brief and positive.
success-state.dont_use_when: Use as a permanent banner; Rely on the green color alone.

switch.intent: Immediate-effect toggle for a single setting. Use when the change takes effect without a Save action. For form fields use Checkbox.
switch.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
switch.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

table.intent: Display structured records in rows and columns; the workhorse of an enterprise console.
table.use_when: Use th with scope for headers; caption the table; Right-align numerals; keep row height stable; Pair with Pagination + a results count.
table.dont_use_when: Use tables for page layout; Pack 12 columns into a phone width; Lose the header on scroll for long tables.

tabs.intent: Switch between sibling views of related content within the same page region. For top-level navigation use a side nav; for primary actions use Buttons.
tabs.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
tabs.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

tags-input.intent: Free-text entry of multiple values as pills (labels, keywords) — optionally with suggestions.
tags-input.use_when: Confirm a tag on Enter/comma; make pills removable; De-duplicate; optionally validate each tag; Offer suggestions when a known set exists.
tags-input.dont_use_when: Allow invalid/duplicate tags silently; Lose typed text on blur without adding.

text-input.intent: Single-line free-text input. For multi-line use Textarea. For closed lists use Select. For sensitive values use `type="password"`.
text-input.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
text-input.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

textarea.intent: Multi-line free-text input. For single-line use TextInput. For rich content use a rich-text editor (not in this DS).
textarea.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
textarea.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

theme-icon.intent: A filled container that gives an icon a consistent shape and background — for feature bullets, list leading icons, stat tiles.
theme-icon.use_when: Treat as decorative — put the meaning in adjacent text; Keep size in step with the text it accompanies.
theme-icon.dont_use_when: Make it the only carrier of meaning; Use as an interactive control.

timeline.intent: Show a sequence of events over time — an access request lifecycle, an activity log, a process trail.
timeline.use_when: Order newest- or oldest-first consistently; Mark completed vs upcoming with bullet AND label; Keep each item title scannable.
timeline.dont_use_when: Mix orderings; Encode state by bullet color alone.

toast.intent: Transient, non-blocking status: "Saved", "Copied", "Deleted — Undo". Self-dismissing, stacked bottom-right, max 5 visible.
toast.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
toast.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

tool-call-card.intent: A transparent record of a tool/function the agent invoked: name + status badge in the header, expandable arguments (as code) and result. Status is carried by a labelled `Badge` (text), not color alone.
tool-call-card.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
tool-call-card.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

tooltip.intent: Short, supplementary text revealed on hover or keyboard focus. Names an icon-only button, explains a truncated label, surfaces a keyboard shortcut.
tooltip.use_when: Use when the component spec and token contract match the product need.
tooltip.dont_use_when: Do not use when another Clementine component has a more specific contract.

tree.intent: A hierarchical, expandable node list — file trees, org/permission hierarchies, nested resources.
tree.use_when: Support keyboard nav (arrows expand/collapse/move); Show selection + expansion clearly.
tree.dont_use_when: Hide deep nodes with no affordance; Rely on indentation alone.

undo-bar.intent: A transient bar confirming an agent action and offering to reverse it — reversibility as a core safety affordance.
undo-bar.use_when: Name what happened + offer Undo; Auto-dismiss after a grace period; Make Undo keyboard-reachable.
undo-bar.dont_use_when: Offer Undo for irreversible actions; Dismiss before the user can react.

validation-message.intent: Inline field validation feedback for error, warning, or success.
validation-message.use_when: Tie error messages to the field via aria-describedby; Lead with the glyph and plain wording.
validation-message.dont_use_when: Signal validity by color alone; Write vague messages like "invalid".
